title: Dekton 5 Piece Engineers File Set-Precision Steel Files For Metal, Wood, Plastic Shaping| Includes Flat, Half-round, Round, Triangle, Square Files| Durable, Hardened Steel For Professional And Diy Use
features: Versatile Filing Options: The Dekton 5 Piece Engineers File Set is meticulously designed to cover a broad range of filing needs. This set includes five distinct types of files: Flat, Half-Round, Round, Triangle, and Square. Each file is crafted to handle different shapes and sizes, making it ideal for tasks involving metal, wood, and plastic.

High-Carbon Steel Construction: Each file in the set is made from high-carbon steel, known for its exceptional hardness and durability. This material ensures that the files maintain their sharpness and effectiveness over time, even under rigorous use. The hardened steel construction allows for precision filing and long-lasting performance

Double-Cut Design for Efficiency: The files feature a double-cut pattern that enhances their cutting efficiency. This design allows for faster material removal and smoother finishes, reducing the amount of effort required during filing tasks. The double-cut teeth are particularly effective in handling tough materials and provide a clean

Comfortable Anti-Slip Handles: Each file is equipped with ergonomically designed anti-slip soft grip handles. These handles provide superior comfort and control, reducing hand fatigue and ensuring a secure grip during use. The anti-slip design helps prevent accidents and inaccuracies, allowing for greater precision and safety while working on your projects.

Durable and Reliable Performance: Built to withstand the demands of both professional and DIY use, the Dekton Engineers File Set delivers reliable performance across various tasks. The combination of high-carbon steel and thoughtful design ensures that these files can handle heavy-duty use
description: Introducing the Dekton 5 Piece Engineers File Set, an essential tool for precision metalworking and shaping. This comprehensive filing set features five meticulously crafted files, each designed with varying sizes and shapes to accommodate a wide range of filing tasks. The set includes flat, round, half-round, square, and triangle files, allowing for versatile application in smoothing edges, refining contours, and achieving precise finishes on metal surfaces. Constructed from high-carbon steel, each file delivers exceptional durability and cutting performance, ensuring consistent results and longevity even under rigorous use. The double-cut design of the blades enhances efficiency by providing a smoother and more effective filing experience, making it easier to tackle tough materials and achieve desired results with less effort. The Dekton Engineers File Set is equipped with anti-slip soft grip handles that ensure maximum comfort and control during use. The ergonomic design of the handles reduces hand fatigue and provides a secure grip, allowing for precise handling and reducing the risk of slippage, which can lead to inaccuracies or accidents. This 5-piece set is ideal for both professional tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts, offering the flexibility to handle a variety of filing tasks with ease. Whether you're working on metal fabrication, automotive repairs, or intricate detail work, the Dekton Engineers File Set provides the reliable performance and versatility you need to get the job done efficiently.
